name: @stimulir/code-runtime-core
description: Stimulir-flavored thin wrapper over @rivet-dev/agent-os-core. Re-exports the upstream API and adds createStimulirAgentSession(spec) — a single-call helper that does the explicit AuthStorage / ModelRegistry / SettingsManager / DefaultResourceLoader / SessionManager wire-up the upstream silently fails to require. Eliminates the silent-no-engagement footgun for every downstream adapter.
